title: Engination
description: Fun blocks for convention centers and adventure maps
body:
Adds various gadgets for conventions and modded adventure maps:

* Growable, throwable tomatoes
* Vertical "Launcher" blocks
* Horizontal "Conveyor" blocks
* Landing Pads to eliminate fall damage
* Disappearing Blocks, which become insubstanital when certain conditions are met (such as punching them with your bare hand, or walking on them), and then reappear shortly after.
